source.name: U.S. Census Bureau / congress-legislators
source.description: Congressional district boundaries and current seat assignments from official-derived datasets

meta.note: Substitute for deprecated Google Civic representatives API. District seats from congress-legislators; geocoder for address lookup.

records.censusGeocoderNote: Senate seats are statewide; district field 0 denotes statewide senators.
